race.description: Ladbrokes 2026 Battle Of The Bush Final Quality Hcp
race.comment: This race is a lottery as is the case most years. Veteran KING JESTER (10) raced handy all the way and did a good job to be beaten under a length over 1000m at Toowoomba last time out. That form looks strong in this race. Well in on 54kgs and should give backers a great sight. ESTE DIA (9) added to his outstanding recent form when a comfortable all-the-way winner of an open sprint at Emerald six weeks ago. Drawn to advantage and should be prominent for a long way. The speedy SUNNYCOAST (3) has been carrying big weights up north to great effect this prep. Loves this trip and with blinkers back on looks a key contender. SMACKEROONY (16) needs luck from the outside draw but his recent win at Gympie was highly impressive.
